title: Trend T7 1/2 Inch Variable Speed Workshop Router and Kitbox, Perfect for Kitchen Fitting, Worktop Joints & Timber Profiling, 2100W, 240V, Black, T7EK
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: POWERFUL PERFORMANCE: The T7EK Plunge Router features a 2100W motor with a great power-to-weight ratio, making it easy to handle and capable of delivering smooth and effortless cuts.
VERSATILE PLUNGE LENGTH: With a plunge depth of up to 50mm, this router is perfect for a variety of applications, including kitchen fitting, worktop cutting, sink fitting, and carcass modifications.
PRECISE CONTROL: The 6-level variable speed control allows for precise adjustments to accommodate a wide range of cutters, materials, and applications.
ENHANCED SAFETY: Advanced safety features, including a plunge depth limiter and double locking collet, ensure safe and accurate cutting.

CONVENIENT & PORTABLE: The T7EK Plunge Router comes with an ergonomic design, a moulded carry case for easy storage and transportation, and dust protection gaiters that keep the plunge mechanism operating smoothly.
description: From the manufacturer Trend T7 1/2 Inch Variable Speed Workshop Router, 2100W, 240V, T7EK The Trend T7 Workshop Router delivers effortless, precise cuts in a variety of applications, making it an ideal choice for kitchen fitting, worktop joints, and timber profiling. Its ergonomic design and carry case ensure easy handling and portability, letting you take expert craftsmanship wherever you go. With your Trend T7 Router we include these accessories: 1 x 1/2" Collet 1 x 1/4" Reducing Sleeve 1 x 35mm Clip-in Dust Spout 1 x 30mm Guide Bush 1 x Side-fence with Micro Adjuster 1 x Centering pin with ring sleeve 1 x Storage Case Trend T1 1/4" Plunge & Trim Router Trend T5 1000W 1/4" Plunge Router Trend T7 2100W 1/2" Plunge Router Trend T8 2200W 1/2" Plunge Router Trend T12 2300W 1/2" Plunge Router Trend T14 2300W 1/2" Plunge Router Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 39 4.4 out of 5 stars 77 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,040 4.5 out of 5 stars 42 3.6 out of 5 stars 29 4.6 out of 5 stars 44 Price £119.99 £ 119 . 99 — no data £148.95 £ 148 . 95 £251.99 £ 251 . 99 £329.99 £ 329 . 99 £464.39 £ 464 . 39 Power 710W 1000W 2100W 2200W 2300W 2300W Collet Size 8mm 1/4" 1/2" (with 1/4" Reducing Sleeve) 1/2" 1/2" 1/2" Max.
